    arxiv-daily

    Automated deployment @ 2025-03-22 21:15:43 Asia/Shanghai

    Welcome to contribute! Add your topics and keywords in topic.yml. You can also view historical data through the storage.

    Large-Language Model

    Prompt Engineering

    Publish Date Title Authors PDF Code
    2025-03-20 Stop Overthinking: A Survey on Efficient Reasoning for Large Language Models Yang Sui et.al. 2503.16419v1 null
    2025-03-20 Issue2Test: Generating Reproducing Test Cases from Issue Reports Noor Nashid et.al. 2503.16320v1 null
    2025-03-20 Chain of Functions: A Programmatic Pipeline for Fine-Grained Chart Reasoning Data Zijian Li et.al. 2503.16260v1 null
    2025-03-20 M2N2V2: Multi-Modal Unsupervised and Training-free Interactive Segmentation Markus Karmann et.al. 2503.16254v1 null
    2025-03-20 AI Agents in Cryptoland: Practical Attacks and No Silver Bullet Atharv Singh Patlan et.al. 2503.16248v1 null
    2025-03-20 EP240414a: A Gamma-Ray Burst Jet Weakened by an Extended Circumstellar Material Hamid Hamidani et.al. 2503.16243v1 null
    2025-03-20 VP-NTK: Exploring the Benefits of Visual Prompting in Differentially Private Data Synthesis Chia-Yi Hsu et.al. 2503.16195v1 null
    2025-03-20 Towards Lighter and Robust Evaluation for Retrieval Augmented Generation Alex-Razvan Ispas et.al. 2503.16161v1 null
    2025-03-20 Only a Little to the Left: A Theory-grounded Measure of Political Bias in Large Language Models Mats Faulborn et.al. 2503.16148v1 null
    2025-03-20 Multi-Prompt Style Interpolation for Fine-Grained Artistic Control Lei Chen et.al. 2503.16133v1 null
    2025-03-20 Controllable Segmentation-Based Text-Guided Style Editing Jingwen Li et.al. 2503.16129v1 null
    2025-03-20 Probabilistic Prompt Distribution Learning for Animal Pose Estimation Jiyong Rao et.al. 2503.16120v1 null
    2025-03-20 OSLoPrompt: Bridging Low-Supervision Challenges and Open-Set Domain Generalization in CLIP Mohamad Hassan N C et.al. 2503.16106v1 null
    2025-03-20 Cultural Alignment in Large Language Models Using Soft Prompt Tuning Reem I. Masoud et.al. 2503.16094v1 null
    2025-03-20 PromptHash: Affinity-Prompted Collaborative Cross-Modal Learning for Adaptive Hashing Retrieval Qiang Zou et.al. 2503.16064v1 link
    2025-03-20 Corrective In-Context Learning: Evaluating Self-Correction in Large Language Models Mario Sanz-Guerrero et.al. 2503.16022v1 null
    2025-03-20 Animating the Uncaptured: Humanoid Mesh Animation with Video Diffusion Models Marc Benedí San Millán et.al. 2503.15996v1 null
    2025-03-20 ECKGBench: Benchmarking Large Language Models in E-commerce Leveraging Knowledge Graph Langming Liu et.al. 2503.15990v1 null
    2025-03-20 STOP: Integrated Spatial-Temporal Dynamic Prompting for Video Understanding Zichen Liu et.al. 2503.15973v1 null
    2025-03-20 From Structured Prompts to Open Narratives: Measuring Gender Bias in LLMs Through Open-Ended Storytelling Evan Chen et.al. 2503.15904v1 null
    2025-03-20 Enhancing Zero-Shot Image Recognition in Vision-Language Models through Human-like Concept Guidance Hui Liu et.al. 2503.15886v1 null
    2025-03-20 Human or LLM? A Comparative Study on Accessible Code Generation Capability Hyunjae Suh et.al. 2503.15885v1 null
    2025-03-20 DroidTTP: Mapping Android Applications with TTP for Cyber Threat Intelligence Dincy R Arikkat et.al. 2503.15866v1 null
    2025-03-20 VideoRFSplat: Direct Scene-Level Text-to-3D Gaussian Splatting Generation with Flexible Pose and Multi-View Joint Modeling Hyojun Go et.al. 2503.15855v1 null
    2025-03-20 Multiwavelength Analysis of GRB 250101A: From Gamma-ray Prompt Emission to Optical Afterglow Guowang Du et.al. 2503.15805v1 null
    2025-03-20 DNA Bench: When Silence is Smarter -- Benchmarking Over-Reasoning in Reasoning LLMs Masoud Hashemi et.al. 2503.15793v1 null
    2025-03-20 RL4Med-DDPO: Reinforcement Learning for Controlled Guidance Towards Diverse Medical Image Generation using Vision-Language Foundation Models Parham Saremi et.al. 2503.15784v1 null
    2025-03-20 Detecting LLM-Written Peer Reviews Vishisht Rao et.al. 2503.15772v1 null
    2025-03-20 Using Language Models to Decipher the Motivation Behind Human Behaviors Yutong Xie et.al. 2503.15752v1 null
    2025-03-19 ECLAIR: Enhanced Clarification for Interactive Responses John Murzaku et.al. 2503.15739v1 null

    2025-03-20 XAttention: Block Sparse Attention with Antidiagonal Scoring Ruyi Xu et.al. 2503.16428v1 null
    2025-03-20 DynamicVis: An Efficient and General Visual Foundation Model for Remote Sensing Image Understanding Keyan Chen et.al. 2503.16426v1 link
    2025-03-20 Tokenize Image as a Set Zigang Geng et.al. 2503.16425v1 link
    2025-03-20 Bézier Splatting for Fast and Differentiable Vector Graphics Xi Liu et.al. 2503.16424v1 null
